                                               [ <PROJECT_ROOT>/tests/data/small_1x1.csv ]                                              
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ This is a single cell containing exactly one moderately long sentence deployed seamlessly to test the extreme edge case of a one-by-one grid layout natively. ┃
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛


[ <PROJECT_ROOT>/tests/data/small_5x5.csv ]
┏━━━━━━┳━━━━━━┳━━━━━━┳━━━━━━┳━━━━━━┓
┃  A   ┃  B   ┃  C   ┃  D   ┃  E   ┃
┣━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━┫
┃    1 ┃    2 ┃    3 ┃    4 ┃    5 ┃
┣━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━┫
┃   10 ┃   20 ┃   30 ┃   40 ┃   50 ┃
┣━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━┫
┃  100 ┃  200 ┃  300 ┃  400 ┃  500 ┃
┣━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━╋━━━━━━┫
┃ 1000 ┃ 2000 ┃ 3000 ┃ 4000 ┃ 5000 ┃
┗━━━━━━┻━━━━━━┻━━━━━━┻━━━━━━┻━━━━━━┛
